name: Diamond Chandbali
description: The crescent moon silhouette of the chandbali, reimagined with a scatter of VS-clarity diamonds. Set in 18kt yellow gold with a secure omega clasp. A statement piece for weddings, receptions, and festive evenings.
careInstructions: Store in the provided box away from sunlight. Clean with a soft, dry cloth only.
shipping: Ships within 3–5 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹1000.
returns: Returns accepted within 7 days in original, unworn condition with intact packaging.
